name: Fool
upright: A new journey, naive courage, unexpected leap. Being able to start life from 'zero'.
essence: The start of the Tarot journey. The zero card — nothing yet, but the potential to be everything.
advice: Today pick a small 'I don't know' experience. The Fool's freedom isn't in ignorance — it is in the courage to start without judgement.

name: Magician
upright: Power to turn intent into reality. All tools in hand.
essence: Energy transferred top to bottom. Thought turning into matter.
advice: Today write a clear intent and use one of your small tools. Magic is not technique — it is conscious direction.

name: High Priestess
upright: Unspoken knowledge, intuition, inner knowing.
reversed: Refusing intuition, surface-level, unable to share a secret.
essence: Silent wise woman sitting between two pillars. Feminine inner knowing.
advice: Today for a decision write the first voice coming from inside. Without looking for reasons.

name: Empress
upright: Giving feminine, creativity, harmony with nature, pregnancy (real/symbolic).
essence: Female goddess on the throne of abundance. Nature's generosity.
advice: Today create something — meal, art, a letter. Creating is meditation.

name: Emperor
upright: Boundary, structure, responsible masculine authority.
essence: On a stone-carved throne. Mature masculine power.
advice: Today set a clear boundary somewhere. Structure does not kill love — it makes it possible.

name: Hierophant
upright: Wisdom of tradition, teaching, spiritual doctrine.
reversed: Dogma, slave to institution, not questioning.
essence: The bridge carrying sacred knowledge through tradition.
advice: Today evaluate a tradition with critical love. Respect + question together.

name: Lovers
upright: Spiritual bond, meaningful choice, value alignment.
essence: Not love but the symbol of choice aligned with value. The integration of two sides.
advice: Today align a 'love' decision with your values. Passion isn't enough — harmony is needed.

name: Chariot
upright: Pulling opposing forces in one direction, victory through will.
reversed: Loss of direction, lack of inner control, arrogance.
essence: Two sphinxes pulling the same chariot — the driver finds his balance.
advice: Today gather the energy you scatter into one goal. 3 priorities, the rest wait.

name: Strength
upright: Taming the wild side with compassion. Not force — but the power of gentleness.
reversed: Repressed anger, false softness, slave to control.
essence: A woman gently closes the lion's jaw.
advice: Today if anger comes wait 30 seconds, then speak. Patience is the door of strength.

name: Hermit
upright: Conscious solitude, inner quest, own lantern.
essence: Walking alone on a mountain with a lantern.
advice: Today practice 1 hour 'no social media, no talking'.

name: Wheel of Fortune
upright: Natural cycle of life, accepting change.
reversed: Stuck in the grip of the wheel, refusing control, personalising bad timing.
essence: The wheel continually turning — top and bottom are on the same wheel.
advice: Today recall one 'top' and one 'bottom' moment. Both passed. This too will pass.

name: Justice
upright: Taking responsibility, cause-effect awareness, honest alignment.
reversed: Judgement, revenge, unable to close the account.
essence: Sword and scales — no bargaining, just weighing.
advice: Is there an 'account' you've postponed today? Debt, apology, real talk. Take one step.

name: Hanged Man
upright: Conscious surrender, seeing from a reverse angle, the power of waiting.
reversed: Passivity, victim role, getting stuck suspended.
essence: Hanging upside down from the foot, gazing at the world reversed in calm.
advice: Today step back 24 hours from what you are insisting on solving.

name: Death
upright: Conscious end of a chapter, making room for renewal.
reversed: Resisting endings, clinging to the old state, refusing transformation.
essence: Tarot's most misunderstood card — not physical death, but end of a chapter.
advice: Today officially end something — subscription, habit, group. Small death, big space.

name: Temperance
upright: Patience, right proportion, meeting of opposites.
reversed: Tilt to extremes, loss of balance, breakdown of patience.
essence: An angel pours water between two cups — continuous flow.
advice: Today make a 10% 'correction' in an area you've pushed too far.

name: Devil
upright: Seeing the addiction, awareness that the chain is loose.
reversed: Moment of breaking the chain, breaking captivity.
essence: Two people in chains — but the chain is loose. Inner captivity.
advice: Today try for 24 hours to do what you say 'I can't'. Just 24 hours. Test the chain.

name: Tower
upright: Collapse of the false structure, the truth becoming visible.
reversed: Romanticising destruction, deliberately burning your own tower.
essence: Lightning hits the structure and brings it down — what was false falls.
advice: Recall your last 'shaking' experience. What false comfort did it take away?

name: Star
upright: Calm hope after crisis, return of inspiration.
essence: A naked woman under the night sky pouring water on earth and pool.
advice: Today look 5 min at the starry night or a starry photo. Allow unreasoned hope.

name: Moon
upright: Acceptance of uncertainty, intuitive depth, dream work.
reversed: Don't fear the illusion, paranoia, deciding from fear.
essence: A wolf and a dog bark at night, a crab emerges from water.
advice: Today instead of a clear decision write a dream. There is information in uncertainty.

name: Sun
upright: Genuine joy, earned clarity, playful spirit.
reversed: False optimism, not seeing the shadow, constant 'be good' pressure.
essence: A child on a white horse in front of sunflowers.
advice: Today consciously live a 'good' moment. No photo, no sharing — just be.

name: Judgement
upright: Awakening to a genuine call, facing the past.
reversed: Stuck in the past, judgemental approach.
essence: The trumpet sound raises the dead from graves.
advice: Today write the 'inner voice' you've long ignored.

name: World
upright: Completion, celebrating wholeness, closing of cycle.
reversed: Thinking 'I arrived' and freezing, not seeing the next cycle.
essence: A naked figure dances, four creatures at four corners.
advice: Write what you have achieved in the last 6 months. Honour — celebrate — then wait.

name: Ace of Cups
upright: A new love, deep emotional opening, filling of the heart.
reversed: Emotional block, closed heart, not expressing.
essence: The water cup fills — a new emotional flow begins.
advice: Today feel a feeling without censorship. Even just for yourself.

name: Two of Cups
upright: A deep bond between two people, mutual harmony.
reversed: Crack in the bond, unbalanced exchange.
essence: The exchange of two cups — the moment of unity.
advice: Today in a bond ask 'what do you feel' — active listening.

name: Three of Cups
upright: Celebration of three friends, collective joy.
reversed: Excessive socialising, using celebration as escape.
essence: Three people joining cups — joy multiplies in sharing.
advice: Today share a small success — joy multiplies.

name: Four of Cups
upright: Not seeing three cups, waiting for the fourth — missing opportunity.
essence: Not valuing what you have.
advice: Today be grateful for 3 things you have right now. What you don't see is there.

name: Five of Cups
upright: Three spilled cups — grief. But two cups still standing.
reversed: Emerging from grief, seeing what remains.
essence: The loss is real but not everything is lost.
advice: Today mourn but also recognise 'what remains'. Two cups are still there.

name: Six of Cups
upright: Return to sweet memories of the past, compassion for inner child.
reversed: Getting stuck in the past, idealising.
essence: Two children gift each other cups — a moment of purity.
advice: Today remember a sweet memory from your childhood. It still lives in you.

name: Seven of Cups
upright: Indecision among many choices, mix of fantasy and reality.
essence: Seven cups, each with a visual — which is real?
advice: Today separate which of the options is 'fantasy', which 'real'.

name: Eight of Cups
upright: Conscious departure from an unsatisfying situation.
essence: A figure leaves eight cups and walks toward the mountain.
advice: Today take a step away from an area that doesn't give you energy.

name: Nine of Cups
upright: Emotional satisfaction, the wish coming true.
essence: Nine cups arranged in order — 'wish card'.
advice: Today remember a wish of yours that came true. Honour.

name: Ten of Cups
upright: Family, home, deep emotional harmony.
essence: A family under a rainbow — emotional fullness.
advice: Today say something to a family member or member of your 'chosen family': gratitude.

name: Ace of Pentacles
upright: A new material opportunity, solid starting seed.
essence: A hand holds a pentacle (coin).
advice: Today sow a small material/health seed — a saving, an exercise.

name: Two of Pentacles
upright: Balancing two responsibilities, multi-tasking.
essence: A figure holds two pentacles like a sail.
advice: Today name two burdens you carry. Which can you release?

name: Three of Pentacles
upright: Craft together, professional recognition, mastery.
essence: Three people build a church together.
advice: Today think of a point you add value to a team. Carry with honour.

name: Four of Pentacles
upright: Holding what you have — security or miserliness.
essence: A figure tightly holds four pentacles.
advice: Today give something — money, time, attention. Flow is wealth.

name: Five of Pentacles
upright: Material / health hardship, feeling alone.
essence: Two poor pass by a church window in snow.
advice: Today ask for help — even if small. Don't carry alone.

name: Six of Pentacles
upright: Conscious sharing, give-take balance.
essence: The rich holds scales giving to the poor — but the balance is important.
advice: Today review your give-take balance. Which is missing?

name: Seven of Pentacles
upright: The farmer looks at his crop — patience, long-term labour.
essence: Pentacles grow in the field — labour about to become fruit.
advice: Today look at a long-term labour of yours. Still worth it? Sustain patience?

name: Eight of Pentacles
upright: Focused labour to master a craft.
essence: A craftsman engraves 8 pentacles — discipline.
advice: Today do 30 minutes of focused practice on a subject. Repetition is mastery.

name: Nine of Pentacles
upright: Luxury earned by your own labour, independent wealth.
essence: A woman alone in luxury in her garden.
advice: Today enjoy a small luxury earned by your own labour.

name: Ten of Pentacles
upright: Family / generational legacy, lasting structure, sustainable success.
essence: Old wise one in front of the family, ten pentacles in formation.
advice: Today think of an 'inheritance' — not necessarily material. A step for sustaining it.

name: Ace of Swords
upright: Clear insight, seeing truth, a new idea.
essence: A hand holds a sword in the sky — birth of clarity.
advice: Today tell the truth about something — even the hardest.

name: Two of Swords
upright: Unable to decide, avoiding the truth.
reversed: Time to decide, seeing the truth.
essence: A blindfolded woman balances two swords.
advice: Today think of a postponed decision. Open the eyes.

name: Three of Swords
upright: A heart pierced by three swords — deep emotional pain.
essence: Three swords in the heart — the pain of truth.
advice: Today name a heart pain — without judgement. Own it.

name: Four of Swords
upright: Actively resting, healing withdrawal.
essence: A knight rests on a stone tomb.
advice: Today apply 30 minutes of 'doing nothing'.

name: Five of Swords
upright: Coming out victor but the gain is dry — the loser is part of you.
reversed: Making peace, giving up the fight.
essence: A figure gathers swords, others move away.
advice: Today drop being 'right' in an argument. Bond is more important than winning.

name: Six of Swords
upright: Moving away from a hard situation toward calmer waters.
essence: A boat toward calm waters, swords inside — lessons learned.
advice: Today move away from an 'old shore'. Look at the new coast.

name: Seven of Swords
upright: Strategy, acting alone — sometimes there is theft.
essence: A figure steals five swords, leaves two behind.
advice: Today try a way 'not direct' on a subject. Smartness is essential.

name: Eight of Swords
upright: A prison you made for yourself — bonds loose but you don't see.
essence: A woman surrounded by swords, eyes blindfolded — but the bond is actually not tight.
advice: Today question a situation where you say 'I can't get out'. Are the bonds really locked?

name: Nine of Swords
upright: Mental pain, worry, night sleep.
essence: A figure wakes at night — nine swords above her.
advice: Today before sleep write down a worry. The paper carries — you relax.

name: Ten of Swords
upright: The worst happened — now only the way up.
essence: A figure on the ground pierced with ten swords — light dawns on the horizon.
advice: Today you may have an area at the bottom. Start looking up.

name: Ace of Wands
upright: New inspiration, creative spark.
essence: A hand holds a wand full of fire — starting energy.
advice: Today if inspiration comes write it down immediately. Caught late, lost.

name: Two of Wands
upright: Looking at the broad horizon, planning, seeing the world in your hand.
reversed: Unable to plan from fear, narrow view.
essence: A figure with the globe in hand looks into the distance.
advice: Today write a 5-year vision. It doesn't have to be clear — direction matters.

name: Three of Wands
upright: The plan is in motion, ships on the horizon.
essence: A figure at a cliff with three wands watches ships on the horizon.
advice: Today honour a step you took toward the future. The ships are coming.

name: Four of Wands
upright: Completing a stage, celebration, home comfort.
reversed: Lack of inner celebration, family tension.
essence: Four wands form a gate, decorated with flowers.
advice: Today celebrate a small success. A moment to dress up.

name: Five of Wands
upright: Five people battle with wands — small conflicts, competition.
essence: Five figures wave wands at each other — some real fight, some play.
advice: Today turn a small conflict into play — give up winning.

name: Six of Wands
upright: Public approval, open victory.
essence: A figure on horseback, laurel wreath on head, crowd applauds.
advice: Today share a success you have. The right to be seen.

name: Seven of Wands
upright: Defending your position, resistance.
essence: A figure stands high against six wands.
advice: Today clarify a subject you defend. Still worth it?

name: Eight of Wands
upright: Quick developments, news in succession.
essence: Eight wands fly in the air — speed of an arrow.
advice: Today send a held message / action. Speed matters.

name: Nine of Wands
upright: Tired but standing — the edge of the final test.
essence: A wounded figure leans on the ninth wand in front of eight.
advice: Today accept your fatigue — but remember your endurance. Very close.

name: Ten of Wands
upright: Carrying too much load — but near the goal.
essence: A figure barely carries ten wands in arms.
advice: Today drop 1 of the burdens you carry or delegate. Heroism is not abundance but ability.

name: Knight of Cups
upright: Romantic offers, emotional quest.
essence: The Knight of Cups is a romantic figure on the road with a cup.
advice: Today make a 'emotional offer' — a letter, a message.

name: Knight of Pentacles
upright: Slow but sure progress, patient effort.
essence: The Knight of Pentacles on a solid horse.
advice: Today do a task slowly but fully. Not haste — quality.

name: Knight of Swords
upright: Quick mind, bold, action through thought power.
essence: The Knight of Swords rushes like the wind.
advice: Today reach a decision fast — but consciously.

name: Knight of Wands
upright: Passionate adventure, desire for sudden change.
essence: The Knight of Wands on a horse in flames.
advice: Today disrupt the routine — leap into a small adventure.

name: Queen of Cups
upright: Deep empathy, sensitive intuition.
reversed: Excessive emotional load, loss of boundary.
essence: The Queen of Cups sits by the water.
advice: Today create an empathy moment — active listening, touch.

name: Queen of Pentacles
upright: Practical abundance, motherhood, body care.
essence: The Queen of Pentacles in her garden — practice of giving feminine.
advice: Today give yourself a bodily gift — food, massage, bath.

name: Queen of Swords
upright: Direct communication, smart independence.
essence: The Queen of Swords on her throne — wisdom and resolve.
advice: Today speak directly — clarity instead of diplomacy.

name: Queen of Wands
upright: Charismatic leadership, warm confidence.
essence: The Queen of Wands in front of sunflowers — confident, creative.
advice: Today see yourself on stage. Talent is not denied.

name: King of Cups
upright: Emotional maturity, diplomacy.
essence: The King of Cups serene on his throne in choppy seas.
advice: Today in a tense situation choose the 'mature adult' tone.

name: King of Pentacles
upright: Material / professional maturity, secure leadership.
essence: The King of Pentacles on his throne — earned wealth.
advice: Today be grateful for a material / professional success.

name: King of Swords
upright: Smart authority, fair decision.
essence: The King of Swords on his throne — justice personified.
advice: Today make a clear decision on a 'justice' matter — principle, not emotion.

name: King of Wands
upright: Visionary charismatic leader.
essence: The King of Wands on his throne — vision and action.
advice: Today talk through your vision — share, take a step further.

name: Page of Cups
upright: A new emotional message, creative child energy.
essence: The Page of Cups — a fish emerges from his cup — intuition.
advice: Today spend a moment with your inner child.

name: Page of Pentacles
upright: New learning, practical beginning.
essence: The Page of Pentacles looks at his pentacle — focused student.
advice: Today take a first step toward something you want to learn — a video, a book.

name: Page of Swords
upright: Young mind, curious questioning.
essence: The Page of Swords raises his sword in the wind.
advice: Today question an idea — criticise, don't accept.

name: Page of Wands
upright: A new passion, news of inspiration.
essence: The Page of Wands looks at the bird on his wand — excitement.
advice: Today make room for a small passion you've postponed — 30 min suffices.
